title: lomaria propinqua
intro: Lomaria propinqua, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Lomariopsidaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Lomaria propinqua is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific research.
